headline: Hundreds of Hollywood stars oppose Paramount’s Warner Bros takeover
summary: Hundreds of Hollywood stars have come out against Paramount’s takeover of Warner Bros, claiming the deal to hand control of the studio to supporters of Donald Trump will hurt democracy.

raw.headline: Hundreds of Hollywood stars oppose Paramount’s Warner Bros takeover

headline: Hollywood Pushes Back on Warner Bros. Deal. Wall Street Has Doubts, Too.
summary: Over 1,000 professionals in the film and television industry signed a letter opposing the Warner Bros., Paramount merger.

headline: Wall Street Lunch: Netflix Draws Bullish Backing As Ad Revenue Seen Doubling To $3B
summary: Netflix (NFLX) is emerging as a lower-volatility business with expanding advertising potential. Morgan Stanley and Wedbush both reiterated bullish views and raised their price targets.

headline: Wall Street still loves streaming, but are its affections well placed?
summary: While streaming continues to drive media stocks, especially around quarterly earnings, it's not clear when it will start driving profits for smaller players.

headline: Hollywood heavyweights voice 'unequivocal opposition' to Paramount-Warner merger in open letter
